---
name: Security report (please do not use)
about: Security vulnerabilities must NOT be filed as public issues
title: "[SECURITY] do not file here — see SECURITY.md"
labels: security, invalid
assignees: ''
---

> 🛑 **STOP — do not file security vulnerabilities as public issues.**

If you have discovered a security vulnerability in SiraGPT, please follow our
private coordinated-disclosure process described in
[SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).

You have two options:

1. **Email** us at [security@siragpt.io](mailto:security@siragpt.io)
2. **Open a GitHub private security advisory** at
   <https://github.com/SiraGPT-ORg/siraGPT/security/advisories/new>

We will acknowledge your report within **48 hours** and follow the SLA defined
in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).

If you opened this issue by mistake, please **close it immediately** and use
one of the channels above. Do not paste vulnerability details in the comments
below — they will be redacted and the issue closed.

Thank you for helping keep SiraGPT and its users safe!
